summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new /pitch route with investor pitch deck functionality. All 9 slides working perfectly with keyboard navigation, API integration, and interactive elements. All existing landing page features continue to work correctly.
passed_tests: Title slide (01/09) displays VIIBE logo and 'Scene Intelligence'
ArrowRight key navigates to next slide, ArrowLeft to previous slide
Progress bar at bottom updates as slides change with 9 navigation dots
Slide 3 (Breakthrough) shows 'tap mechanic' headline and 4 stats (1 tap, 16+, 12+, <1s)
Slide 5 (Live Data) fetches and displays real API response from /api/v1/agent/city/pulse
Live Data slide shows JSON with city: lagos, avg_vibe_score, and venue information
Slide 9 (Ask) shows $50K-$200K funding range and use of funds breakdown
Click navigation dots jump to specific slides (tested slides 1, 3, 5)
Previous/Next buttons in bottom bar work correctly
Click zones (left/right areas) navigate slides correctly
All landing page features still work: heat map section, reactor modal, Lagos pulse
Reactor demo button opens/closes modal correctly
All 13 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
/api/v1/agent/city/pulse endpoint returns live fluctuating data correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all pitch deck and landing page features working)
